title: T2SCH424 ARCHIVED — British Columbia Two-Year Tax Holiday for New Small Businesses (2000 and later taxation years) - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED — T2SCH424 British Columbia Two-Year Tax Holiday for New Small Businesses (2000 and later taxation years)
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
A worksheet for Canadian-controlled private corporations that incorporated in British Columbia after April 30, 1996 and before April 1, 2001. To qualify, the corporation has to be a small business that carried on business in the province sometime between these dates.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. This form is no longer current. Previous year versions are available.

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
This form is no longer current. Previous year versions are available.
- Print and fill out by hand This form is no longer current. Previous year versions are available. Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2003 – Standard print PDF (t2sch424-03e.pdf) 2002 – Standard print PDF (t2sch424-02e.pdf) 2001 – Standard print PDF (t2sch424-01e.pdf) 2000 – Standard print PDF (t2sch424-00e.pdf) 1999 – Standard print PDF (t2sch424-99e.pdf)

- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
